actionable_ideas: Add technical analysis tools for stocks and trading to enhance user experience
Implement a feature to tag mutual funds with specific investment goals or purposes
Improve the withdrawal process for mutual funds to reduce processing time

verbatim_quotes.quote: Great App for Mutual Fund investment but not that great for Stocks and Trading as there are no technicals available.
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]

verbatim_quotes.quote: It's good app with great UI/UX - one feature as a user i want and should be useful for others also that in the Mutual Fund section in the dashboard tab - Against all the MFs should be tagging/purpose/goal
verbatim_quotes.author: [REDACTED_USER]
